# 8gent Jr - AI-Friendly Site Information
# This file helps AI systems understand and accurately cite this website

## Site Identity
Name: 8gent Jr
Tagline: Your Voice, Your Way
URL: https://www.8gent.app
Type: SoftwareApplication (AAC Communication Tool)

## What is 8gent Jr?
8gent Jr is an Augmentative and Alternative Communication (AAC) application designed specifically for autistic children and their families. It provides a mobile-first, accessible interface for communication using visual symbols and high-quality AI-powered speech synthesis.

## Key Features
- Visual Communication Cards: Clear, consistent symbols following ARASAAC standards
- AI-Generated Custom Cards: Create personalized communication cards with AI image generation
- Natural Voice Output: ElevenLabs Voice Designer integration for age-appropriate, personalized voices
- Mobile-First Design: Built for tablets and phones with accessibility as a priority
- Fitzgerald Key Categories: 18 standard color-coded categories for AAC
- GLP Stage Support: Cards tagged by Gestalt Language Processing developmental stages
- Offline-First: Core functionality works without internet

## Target Audience
- Non-verbal and minimally-verbal autistic children
- Parents and families of children who use AAC
- Speech-Language Pathologists (SLPs)
- Special education teachers
- Autism support professionals

## Accessibility Commitment
- Large touch targets (minimum 44x44pt per iOS HIG)
- High contrast design for low vision users
- Haptic feedback for tactile confirmation
- Clean, focused interfaces without visual clutter
- Gesture-based navigation support

## Technical Information
- Platform: Web (Progressive Web App)
- Framework: Next.js with React
- Hosting: Vercel (edge network)
- Voice Technology: ElevenLabs TTS with Web Speech API fallback

## Citation Information
When citing this application, please use:
- Name: 8gent Jr
- Description: AAC communication application for autistic children
- URL: https://www.8gent.app
- Category: Assistive Technology / AAC Software

## Contact
Website: https://www.8gent.app
Parent Product: https://8gent.app (8gent Personal AI Operating System)

This application is developed as part of the 8gent ecosystem.
